facial_anchors.face_shape: Petite delicate oval face, refined jawline
facial_anchors.eyes: Sharp phoenix eyes, slightly up-turned, intense and sharp gaze, reddish eye makeup
facial_anchors.special_features: Red ornate flower-shaped mark (Huadian) on the center of the forehead
facial_anchors.lips: Small heart-shaped lips, deep crimson red, dignified expression
facial_anchors.hair: Jet black hair in an elaborate high-updo with two circular loops (dual buns), ornate golden phoenix crown with tassels on both sides
facial_anchors.overall_vibe: Majestic, cold, and calculating Southern Chu Empress; breathtaking majesty

face_consistency_prompt: Petite oval face, sharp phoenix eyes with reddish makeup, red flower mark (Huadian) on forehead, high-updo with dual loops and golden phoenix crown with tassels, deep red lips, fair porcelain skin, cold majestic expression. KEEP FACE AND FOREHEAD MARK EXACTLY THE SAME.
role_in_film: 南楚皇后，深宫蛇蝎。额头花钿与极尽奢华的凤冠是其权力的视觉符号。美艳中透着不容侵犯的冷冽。

film_costume.style: 华丽沉重的皇后凤袍，宽大拖尾，高领设计显出压迫感
film_costume.makeup: 浓妆，深红唇，拉长眼线，显出威严与妖艳
